meta.title: uPVC Vinyl Windows | Energy Efficient European Windows | DECA
meta.description: Premium uPVC vinyl windows with exceptional energy efficiency. GEALAN profiles, triple-pane glazing, U-values as low as 0.14, and 50+ year lifespan. Manufactured in Massachusetts.

hero.heading: Premium uPVC Windows
hero.subheading: GEALAN-engineered profiles with up to 6 chambers, triple-pane glazing, and U-values as low as 0.14 W/m²K — delivering 40-50% energy savings with a 50+ year lifespan.

profileTechnology.title: What Makes Our uPVC Different
profileTechnology.subtitle: German-engineered GEALAN profiles with multi-chamber design for superior thermal performance.

components.title: Profile Cross-Section
components.description: Multi-chamber uPVC profile with galvanized steel reinforcement for structural rigidity.
components.alt: GEALAN profile cross-section — multi-chamber uPVC window profile

components.title: Chamber Structure
components.description: 5–6 insulating chambers trap air, creating a thermal barrier that outperforms standard vinyl by 40%.
components.alt: GEALAN chamber structure — 5-6 insulating chambers highlighted in green

components.title: Triple Seal System
components.description: Three continuous EPDM gaskets block air, water, and sound at every point of the frame.
components.alt: GEALAN triple seal system — three EPDM gasket contours visible on profile

components.title: Glazing Package
components.description: Triple-pane argon-filled glass unit with warm-edge spacer for maximum thermal and acoustic insulation.
components.alt: GEALAN triple-pane glazing package with argon fill and warm-edge spacer

components.title: Hardware Detail
components.description: Precision Roto/Siegenia hardware with up to 12 locking points for maximum security.
components.alt: Tilt & turn window hardware — Roto/Siegenia multi-point locking system

glazing.title: Glazing Configuration
glazing.subtitle: Compare glass packages side by side — click any type to highlight its performance.

specs.title: Technical Details
specs.subtitle: Built to GEALAN standards with NFRC-certified performance.

finishes.title: GEALAN-acrylcolor® Finishes
finishes.description: Co-extruded acrylic surface technology, proven since 1980. The surface is molecularly bonded to the profile — it cannot peel, crack, or fade.

tabs.title: Tilt to Vent
tabs.description: Just turn handle up to air out your home. Secure, rain-safe airflow — no need to open the window fully.

tabs.title: Easy to Clean
tabs.description: Opens inward, making cleaning more convenient. Clean exterior glass from inside, on any floor.

tabs.title: Air-Tight & Secure
tabs.description: Up to 12 locking points engage with a single handle turn. RC2/RC3 certified security.

cta.title: Ready for Premium uPVC Windows?
cta.subtitle: Get your custom order form, window blueprints, and detailed specification — all prepared for your project.

items.q: Are uPVC windows prone to warping or discoloration?
items.a: No. Our GEALAN profiles use virgin uPVC with co-extruded acrylic surfaces, engineered for dimensional stability from -30°F to 140°F. UV-stable coloring is bonded at the molecular level — it cannot fade, yellow, or peel.

items.q: How do your windows compare to European imports?
items.a: We use the same GEALAN profiles and German Roto/Siegenia hardware as top European manufacturers, but fabricate in Massachusetts. You get identical performance at 30-40% lower cost with local warranties and service.

items.q: What energy savings can I expect?
items.a: Homeowners typically save 40-50% on heating/cooling. A 2,500 sq ft home saves $1,500-2,500 annually. Federal energy tax credits up to $3,200 are available for qualifying installations.

items.q: Can I customize size, shape, and color?
items.a: Absolutely. Every window is custom-made. Arched, circular, triangular — any shape. 50+ RAL colors plus wood-grain laminates. Standard lead time is 4-6 weeks.
We offer FlexScreen® — a virtually invisible, spring-steel insect screen that snaps into place without visible hardware. Unlike traditional screens, FlexScreen doesn't block your view or airflow.
Yes. Professional installation across New England through our field team and vetted local contractors. Every installation includes a final quality inspection.
